Assumes auto campaign paused (saves $21/week), 'pet' keyword paused (saves $14/week). Optimistic scenario.
Week 3: assumes 1 additional bundle sale per week + PPC optimizations. Approaching breakeven.

alerts.action: Launch bundle PPC campaign. Bundle buyer is highest-LTV customer — also request review from this buyer immediately.

alerts.message: BSR 140,726 — BEST EVER. Was 154,800 yesterday, 175,000 last week. Improving 14,000 positions/day.
alerts.action: Continue PPC consistency. BSR momentum will drive organic discovery. Sub-100K BSR possible within 2-3 weeks.

alerts.action: Bundle economics are superior — prioritize bundle PPC and organic ranking.

alerts.action: BSR improvement is the lever — better rank → more organic traffic → faster inventory turn.
